title: Mirror columns across accounts?
excerpt:
Looking to see if there’s a way to mirror column data from two different boards, each existing in different Monday.com accounts. 
My company is paying for two accounts, and I’m a member in both.  I can switch between the…

posts.author: ks_artist (John Kirn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to see if there’s a way to mirror column data from two different boards, each existing in different Monday.com accounts.

My company is paying for two accounts, and I’m a member in both. I can switch between the two by clicking my profile icon in the bottom left, and selecting “Switch accounts” at the top right of the menu.

I’ve played around with the Cross Account Copier admin feature, which copies data, but doesn’t mirror.

Based on my research here in the Community Forum, and experimenting on my own, it doesn’t look like this is possible… but I wanted to double check just to make sure I wasn’t missing something.

Thanks in advance to anyone who replies!

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ks_artist - This may be possible via outside tooling such as make.com where you can integrate two separate monday instances, but as far as I know, there are no native solutions exist to do this within monday.

Mark

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
